segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players chat about Hades 2, water bottles, canning, cork sustainability, and engagement photo outfit choices

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss engagement photo outfit drama, Miami Vice suits, phishing scams, and tangential stories about tan suits and David E. Shaw

segments.label: recap
segments.oneLineSummary: Johnny recaps previous session: spider lair, suspicious tree, meeting Archmage Brightbuckle, learning about priest of Slumber in Palomar

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party receives supplies and feather tokens from Bastion, discusses terrain hazards and hot air balloon ideas before departing for Palomar

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss hot air balloons, fans, crossbows, and spell mechanics; GM clarifies rules about Leomin's Tiny Hut opacity

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party travels south from settlement, makes survival checks, sets up Tangle Hut for night, takes watches, hears distant howls, continues journey next morning

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party navigates rocky terrain, Wise falls into 100-foot crevice, casts Feather Fall, encounters gargoyles emerging from cracks, rolls initiative

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM discuss initiative rolling and debate the spelling/pronunciation of a Dragon Ball Z character name (Whis).

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Initiative order established; GM describes tactical map layout with elevation levels and gargoyle positions emerging from crevices.

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Combat round: Wise casts Fireball on two gargoyles for 28 damage; Glint attacks with Eldritch Blast; party discusses tactics and spell levels

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Glint's turn: attacks gargoyles, uses Misty Escape reaction to avoid second attack and deal psychic damage

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Seven gargoyles attack party members; Glint, Amada, Wise, and Strong take damage from claws

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Strong (Argyle) drops feather fall token, grapples gargoyle, jumps into crevice dealing 34 damage, attacks with zealot hit

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Wise casts Maximilian's Earthen Grasp on gargoyle 6, restains it, then Misty Steps away

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Anzu steps away briefly; Benny makes a joke; GM prompts next player.

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM discuss tactical positioning and enemy counts during active combat encounter.

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Party discusses tactical positioning and spell usage before Glint's turn in combat

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Glint casts Hex on Argyle 3, fires two beams dealing 15 and 20 damage, bloodying one gargoyle

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Amada melts into stone to avoid combat; four gargoyles surround Glint instead

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Gargoyles attack Glint; Glint teleports away, triggering Wisdom saves and negating four attacks

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle 3 hits Glint once; Argyle 5 attacks from above; Argyle 6 is restrained by Wise's hand

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle drops grapple, stands, hits Argyle 5 with reckless strike and Divine Fury, shattering it

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Wise restrains Argyle 6 again with hand, dealing 3 damage; Glint misses two attacks on Argyle 3

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Amada emerges from stone, considers repositioning to support topside gargoyles within 30 feet

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Combat round: Johnny checks on Argyle, Glint attacks and misses, Amada casts Faerie Fire on gargoyles, gargoyles attack party members

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Gargoyles attack Glint and Amada with mixed results; Argyle 4 flees upward; Argyle 6 remains restrained

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Strong climbs and teleports 75 feet up cliff face chasing Argyle 4; Wise casts Fireball then Chromatic Orb, destroying Argyle 6

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Glint disengages and moves; Amada casts Spirit Guardians, killing Argyle 7 and damaging Argyle 4

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Gargoyles attack Glint and Amada with poor rolls; Argyle 3 and 7 fail wisdom saves to Spirit Guardians, taking damage

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Gargoyles attack party members; Spirit Guardians deal damage; Argyle 4 flies away from hole, takes damage from aura

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Strong climbs out of hole, uses Cloud Jaunt, attacks Gargoyle 1 twice for 24 damage, fails to prone it

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Wise casts Fly and Misty Step to ascend 90 feet from crevice; Glint uses Shadow Warp to reposition

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Glint taunts Gargoyle 1, blasts Gargoyle 2 for 12 damage; Amada casts Command to make gargoyles grovel; gargoyles attack

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Strong kills groveling Gargoyle 1; Wise casts Chromatic Orb on Gargoyle 2 for 12 thunder damage, positions overhead

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Glint kills Gargoyle 3 with Eldritch Blast; Amada prepares to cast Inflict Wounds on Gargoyle 7

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Continued combat: Johnny positions, gargoyles attack, Amada blesses party, Strong kills gargoyle with critical strike, Johnny casts Hideous Laughter on remaining gargoyle.

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Final combat round: Strong attacks laughing gargoyle twice, killing it; battlefield quiets after all enemies defeated.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players banter about character ages and make movie/comedy references unrelated to active gameplay.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss past one-shot campaigns and reminisce about previous D&D sessions; meta-conversation about game history.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party travels toward settlement, arrives at walled fort town of Palomar; GM describes town layout with knot, gardens, vigil building, barracks; older human commander approaches.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: GM describes Palomar fort settlement, walls, knot, buildings, and training grounds; players ask clarifying questions about settlement size

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party enters Palomar gate, Captain Yannick Ruda greets them and asks why they've come

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party shakes hands with captain, discusses blue knot phenomenon, learns about Warren the Slumber priest

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Captain leads party through settlement square to Warren's hut; party discusses why captain stays at Palomar

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: GM describes NPC's hut and players introduce themselves; NPC shares experience with blue knot and strange feeling from Slumber.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party questions Slumber after waking; players make insight checks to determine if he's hiding information about an attack.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Warren explains Slumber was trapped in the Scar by Tynans; party theorizes about Slumber reaching out; Johnny urges Warren to join quest

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party asks Warren for boons, books, and artifacts; Warren mentions Karwenian historians at Palomar who study recovered items

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM banter about travel direction to the Scar, world geography, and whether the planet is round—mostly comedic off-topic discussion.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM discuss campaign logistics, travel planning, and joke about software engineering metaphors; meta-discussion about scope and timing.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party discusses meeting with the Phoenicians and the captain's departure, deciding to go speak with them.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss Branch Davidians and Waco standoff as real-world reference for a game faction, with banter about the comparison.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party travels to Carwinian longhouse, meets Tobin; learns of maps to Karwin library and temple ruins

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Palomar knot turns midnight blue and stays blue; Warren shows fear; screams heard across fort; cliffhanger

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss vampire speculation, D&D vs. Pathfinder mechanics, proficiency without level rule, big numbers

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Session wrap-up: praise for world-building and travel difficulty; GM discusses next session in Colorado, character builds/backstories needed

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: GM and players discuss next session in Colorado, character builds, backstories, and logistics

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss Friday park event, Denver altitude effects on alcohol, D&D scheduling, and in-person session logistics
